title: sideritis massoniana var. crassifolia
intro: Sideritis massoniana var. crassifolia, commonly known as Mountain Tea or Ironwort, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sideritis massoniana var. crassifolia include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
